news.title:
Caplin Point subsidiary Caplin Steriles gets USFDA nod for Desmopressin Acetate Injection ANDA.
Approved vials treat haemophilia A, von Willebrand disease, diabetes insipidus; US sales hit $26M in 2025.
news.summary:
Caplin Point subsidiary Caplin Steriles gets USFDA nod for Desmopressin Acetate Injection ANDA.
Approved vials treat haemophilia A, von Willebrand disease, diabetes insipidus; US sales hit $26M in 2025.

news.title:
Caplin Point Lab gets U.S. FDA nod for Sodium Phosphates Injection.
The product is projected to achieve $67M in U.S. sales by 2025.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Lab gets U.S. FDA nod for Sodium Phosphates Injection.
The product is projected to achieve $67M in U.S. sales by 2025.

news.title:
Caplin Point Laboratories achieved record net sales and profitability for Dec 2025 quarter.
Operational efficiency and return ratios faced pressure, reflecting a flat financial trend.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Laboratories achieved record net sales and profitability for Dec 2025 quarter.
Operational efficiency and return ratios faced pressure, reflecting a flat financial trend.

news.title:
Caplin Point Laboratories shared Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on their website.
The call, held on Feb 5, 2026, was announced under Regulation 30 (LODR).
news.summary:
Caplin Point Laboratories shared Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on their website.
The call, held on Feb 5, 2026, was announced under Regulation 30 (LODR).

news.title: Caplin Point Labs reported Q3 revenue of 5.4B INR, up from 5B YoY.
news.summary: Caplin Point Labs reported Q3 revenue of 5.4B INR, up from 5B YoY.

news.title:
Caplin Point Laboratories shareholders approved new director appointments on Jan 31, 2026.
Mrs. Susan Mathew joins as Independent Director for a 5-year term from Jan 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Laboratories shareholders approved new director appointments on Jan 31, 2026.
Mrs. Susan Mathew joins as Independent Director for a 5-year term from Jan 31, 2026.

news.title:
Caplin Steriles, part of Caplin Point Labs, received USFDA approval for Methylprednisolone Acetate.
The drug, a generic of Pfizer's DEPO MEDROL, targets a $57.4M US market by Nov 2025.
news.summary:
Caplin Steriles, part of Caplin Point Labs, received USFDA approval for Methylprednisolone Acetate.
The drug, a generic of Pfizer's DEPO MEDROL, targets a $57.4M US market by Nov 2025.

news.title:
Caplin Point Labs, via subsidiaries CSL and COL, acquired 10 approved ANDAs for injectables and ophthalmics.
The acquisition is from a leading multinational generic product manufacturer, boosting Caplin's US presence.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Labs, via subsidiaries CSL and COL, acquired 10 approved ANDAs for injectables and ophthalmics.
The acquisition is from a leading multinational generic product manufacturer, boosting Caplin's US presence.

news.title:
Caplin Point acquires 10 approved ANDAs targeting US market worth $473.2M by Aug 2025.
Oncology injectables to be commercialized; plans expansion to Mexico, Canada, EU, Brazil.
news.summary:
Caplin Point acquires 10 approved ANDAs targeting US market worth $473.2M by Aug 2025.
Oncology injectables to be commercialized; plans expansion to Mexico, Canada, EU, Brazil.

news.title: Caplin Point is receiving approvals from the US for niche, high-margin drugs.
news.summary: Caplin Point is receiving approvals from the US for niche, high-margin drugs.

news.title: Caplin Point Lab completed INVIMA-Colombia inspection at Puducherry injectable facility.
news.summary: Caplin Point Lab completed INVIMA-Colombia inspection at Puducherry injectable facility.

news.title: Caplin Point receives US FDA approval for an injection for severe infections.
news.summary: Caplin Point receives US FDA approval for an injection for severe infections.

news.title:
Caplin Steriles, Caplin Point's subsidiary, gets USFDA approval for Linezolid Injection.
The generic, equivalent to Zyvox, has projected US sales of $23M by Oct 2025.
news.summary:
Caplin Steriles, Caplin Point's subsidiary, gets USFDA approval for Linezolid Injection.
The generic, equivalent to Zyvox, has projected US sales of $23M by Oct 2025.

news.title:
Caplin Steriles receives USFDA approval for acetaminophen injection for pain relief and fever reduction.
US sales of $86M projected by October 2025 for Caplin Point Laboratories' product.
news.summary:
Caplin Steriles receives USFDA approval for acetaminophen injection for pain relief and fever reduction.
US sales of $86M projected by October 2025 for Caplin Point Laboratories' product.

news.title:
Caplin Point Laboratories shows strong EPS growth at 21% annually over three years, coupled with 11% revenue growth to ₹20b.
Insiders hold 69% of shares, aligning interests with shareholders; CEO compensation is modest at ₹5.7m, below industry median ₹48m.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Laboratories shows strong EPS growth at 21% annually over three years, coupled with 11% revenue growth to ₹20b.
Insiders hold 69% of shares, aligning interests with shareholders; CEO compensation is modest at ₹5.7m, below industry median ₹48m.

news.title:
Caplin Point's subsidiary acquires 5.5 acres in Mexico for a plant.
Facility to produce 50M units/year; $15M setup funded internally by FY27.
news.summary:
Caplin Point's subsidiary acquires 5.5 acres in Mexico for a plant.
Facility to produce 50M units/year; $15M setup funded internally by FY27.

news.title:
Caplin Point Labs reports strong results: net sales up 10.5%, net profit rises 18.1%.
Improved margins and robust balance sheet indicate positive growth outlook.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Labs reports strong results: net sales up 10.5%, net profit rises 18.1%.
Improved margins and robust balance sheet indicate positive growth outlook.

news.title:
Caplin Point's Q2 earnings report shows revenue and net profit growth.
Vivek Partheeban provides detailed analysis of the numbers.
news.summary:
Caplin Point's Q2 earnings report shows revenue and net profit growth.

news.title:
Caplin Point Laboratories appoints Ashok Partheeban, Vivek Partheeban, and Dr. K C John as Additional Directors effective 5th Nov 2025.
Shareholders to approve appointments; Ashok and Vivek as Vice Chairmen, Dr. John as Independent Director for 5 years.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Laboratories appoints Ashok Partheeban, Vivek Partheeban, and Dr. K C John as Additional Directors effective 5th Nov 2025.
Shareholders to approve appointments; Ashok and Vivek as Vice Chairmen, Dr. John as Independent Director for 5 years.

news.title:
Caplin Point Q2 FY26 revenue at 175.2 Cr; PAT at 102.6 Cr.
Consolidated revenue 534 Cr; PAT 160.2 Cr for Sep 2025 quarter.
news.summary:
Caplin Point Q2 FY26 revenue at 175.2 Cr; PAT at 102.6 Cr.
